message.content:
{
  "page_type": "parameter_table",
  "summary": "This page displays a table titled 'Appendix D Cooling Water Quality' with parameters, reference values, and indicators for corrosion and scaling tendencies. It includes both baseline and reference items for water quality metrics.",
  "visual_entities": [
    {"type": "table", "label": "Cooling Water Quality Table"},
    {"type": "header", "label": "Appendix D Cooling Water Quality"},
    {"type": "column", "label": "Item"},
    {"type": "column", "label": "Reference Value"},
    {"type": "column", "label": "Tendency (Corrosion)"},
    {"type": "column", "label": "Tendency (Scaling)"},
    {"type": "row", "label": "pH (25°C)"},
    {"type": "row", "label": "Conductivity (25°C)"},
    {"type": "row", "label": "Chloride Ion Cl⁻"},
    {"type": "row", "label": "Sulfate Ion SO₄²⁻"},
    {"type": "row", "label": "Acid Consumption (pH=4.8)"},
    {"type": "row", "label": "Total Hardness"},
    {"type": "row", "label": "Iron Fe"},
    {"type": "row", "label": "Sulfide Ion S²⁻"},
    {"type": "row", "label": "Ammonium Ion NH₄⁺"},
    {"type": "row", "label": "Silica SiO₂"},
    {"type": "note", "label": "Note: O indicates factors related to corrosion or scaling tendency."}
  ],
  "visual_relationships": [
    {"from": "pH (25°C)", "relation": "has reference value", "to": "6.5-8.0"},
    {"from": "pH (25°C)", "relation": "has corrosion tendency", "to": "O"},
    {"from": "pH (25°C)", "relation": "has scaling tendency", "to": "O"},
    {"from": "Conductivity (25°C)", "relation": "has reference value", "to": "<800 μS/cm"},
    {"from": "Conductivity (25°C)", "relation": "has corrosion tendency", "to": "O"},
    {"from": "Conductivity (25°C)", "relation": "has scaling tendency", "to": "O"},
    {"from": "Chloride Ion Cl⁻", "relation": "has reference value", "to": "<200 mg(Cl⁻)/L"},
    {"from": "Chloride Ion Cl⁻", "relation": "has corrosion tendency", "to": "O"},
    {"from": "Sulfate Ion SO₄²⁻", "relation": "has reference value", "to": "<200 mg(SO₄²⁻)/L"},
    {"from": "Sulfate Ion SO₄²⁻", "relation": "has corrosion tendency", "to": "O"},
    {"from": "Acid Consumption (pH=4.8)", "relation": "has reference value", "to": "<100 mg(CaCO₃)/L"},
    {"from": "Acid Consumption (pH=4.8)", "relation": "has scaling tendency", "to": "O"},
    {"from": "Total Hardness", "relation": "has reference value", "to": "<200 mg(CaCO₃)/L"},
    {"from": "Total Hardness", "relation": "has scaling tendency", "to": "O"},
    {"from": "Iron Fe", "relation": "has reference value", "to": "<1.0 mg(Fe)/L"},
    {"from": "Iron Fe", "relation": "has corrosion tendency", "to": "O"},
    {"from": "Iron Fe", "relation": "has scaling tendency", "to": "O"},
    {"from": "Sulfide Ion S²⁻", "relation": "has reference value", "to": "Not detected mg(S²⁻)/L"},
    {"from": "Sulfide Ion S²⁻", "relation": "has corrosion tendency", "to": "O"},
    {"from": "Ammonium Ion NH₄⁺", "relation": "has reference value", "to": "<1.0 mg(NH₄⁺)/L"},
    {"from": "Ammonium Ion NH₄⁺", "relation": "has corrosion tendency", "to": "O"},
    {"from": "Silica SiO₂", "relation": "has reference value", "to": "<50 mg(SiO₂)/L"},
    {"from": "Silica SiO₂", "relation": "has scaling tendency", "to": "O"}
  ],
  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["water_quality_standards", "cooling_system_maintenance", "corrosion_prevention", "scaling_prevention"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "附录D冷却水水质\n冷却水水质\n项目 基准值 倾向\n腐蚀 结垢\n基准项\n酸碱度 PH (25°C) 6.5~8.0 O O\n导电率 (25°C) μS/cm <800 O O\n氯离子 CL⁻ mg(CL⁻)/L <200 O\n硫酸根离子 SO₄²⁻ mg(SO₄²⁻)/L <200 O\n酸消耗量(PH=4.8) mg(CaCO₃)/L <100 O\n全硬度 mg(CaCO₃)/L <200 O\n参考项目\n铁 Fe mg(Fe)/L <1.0 O O\n硫离子 S²⁻ mg(S²⁻)/L 不得检出 O\n铵离子 NH₄⁺ mg(NH₄⁺)/L <1.0 O\n氧化硅 SiO₂ mg(SiO₂)/L <50 O\n注: O表示腐蚀或结垢倾向的有关因素。",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The table is in Chinese; translations are approximate. The 'O' symbol is defined in the note as indicating factors related to corrosion or scaling tendency. No visual diagrams or wiring are present.",
  "confidence": 0.95
}

parsed.summary: This page displays a table titled 'Appendix D Cooling Water Quality' with parameters, reference values, and indicators for corrosion and scaling tendencies. It includes both baseline and reference items for water quality metrics.

visual_entities.label: Note: O indicates factors related to corrosion or scaling tendency.

parsed.ocr_text_if_useful:
附录D冷却水水质
冷却水水质
项目 基准值 倾向
腐蚀 结垢
基准项
酸碱度 PH (25°C) 6.5~8.0 O O
导电率 (25°C) μS/cm <800 O O
氯离子 CL⁻ mg(CL⁻)/L <200 O
硫酸根离子 SO₄²⁻ mg(SO₄²⁻)/L <200 O
酸消耗量(PH=4.8) mg(CaCO₃)/L <100 O
全硬度 mg(CaCO₃)/L <200 O
参考项目
铁 Fe mg(Fe)/L <1.0 O O
硫离子 S²⁻ mg(S²⁻)/L 不得检出 O
铵离子 NH₄⁺ mg(NH₄⁺)/L <1.0 O
氧化硅 SiO₂ mg(SiO₂)/L <50 O
注: O表示腐蚀或结垢倾向的有关因素。
parsed.uncertainty_notes: The table is in Chinese; translations are approximate. The 'O' symbol is defined in the note as indicating factors related to corrosion or scaling tendency. No visual diagrams or wiring are present.
